suppress.notes: False positive. log4j:log4j 1.2.17 is a deliberate dependency of rewrite-logging-frameworks — the recipes reference Log4j 1.x types in order to detect and migrate legacy Log4j 1.x usage. It is not used as a logging backend at runtime and is not on any deployed runtime classpath, so the Log4j 1.x CVEs (SocketServer/SocketAppender deserialization, JMSAppender, XML config, etc.) are not reachable. Kept only in this repo where the dependency is intentional, rather than in the shared plugin suppressions. Added: 2026-07-03
